mvp.label: Just me testing
mvp.description: Quick check that the app works and has no security issues
mvp.narration: I'll do a quick security check and make sure the app starts up correctly.

team.label: Sharing with colleagues
team.description: Tests, basic error handling, and authentication verified
team.narration: I'll run the tests, check security, and make sure login works correctly.

production.label: External users / company-wide
production.description: Full test suite, performance checks, and senior code review
production.narration: I'll run the full test suite, check performance, and have a senior reviewer examine everything.
